Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}What is that...? I don't like the looks of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}I'm picking up a massive energy surge within the enemy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}If that attack were to land multiple times... Um, I'm gonna try scanning![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}You can't afford to keep taking that attack! You have to stop it somehow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}These readings... Oh! While it's charging up, its power levels become unstable![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 6}If you can disrupt it, that should prevent its attack! Everyone, go on the offensive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 6}Focus on attacking, just like before! That should disrupt the enemy's charging![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 0 6}It's gathering even more power than before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 0 6}Brace for— No, it's too strong... You have to stop it from attacking at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 0 6}You don't stand a chance against this one! You need to interrupt that attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 14 0 6}It's gone...! And it looks like the enemy can't move![n]{f 1 1}
